name: The Candle
short_description: The Candle - Rated R. As night falls and a storm rises over the annual county carnival, you are visited by a mysterious spirit. Tasked with laying his soul to rest, you must brave his long dilapidated manor and avoid the horrifying remnants of his estate staff.
detailed_description:
THE CANDLE

  • Your candle burns in real-time over up to 4 hours

  • Once its light goes out, it cannot be lit again

THE CASTLE

  • Explore the decrepit manor and rummage through drawers for loot

  • Avoid 4 unique spooky scary monsters on your quest to reach the hidden chamber

THE CARNIVAL

  • Play 6 different minigames at the carny's stalls for tickets

  • Exchange your tickets at the carnival office for fun prizes

  • Make allies or build rivalries with those who remain

===================================================================

CONTROLS

Esc / Spacebar: Settings + Inventory

WASD: Move

Shift: Sprint

E: Interact

Left Click: Throw / Fire Weapon

Right Click: Inspect

Right Click + F: Blow Out Candle (If Lit)
